references.title: Student Performance Prediction Model based on Supervised Machine Learning Algorithms
references.journal: IOP Conference Series: Materials Science and Engineering

extracted.Target: F, P, M, G, V and E
extracted.Courses: 2 Editions of a Computerr Science Course
extracted.Features: [Study  Year, Gender, Birth Year, Registration, Course, Employment, Activity Point (40), Examination Point (60), Final Point (100)]
extracted.Preprocessing Details: The authors use Cronbach Alpha to check the consistency of the dataset.
extracted.Models: Decision  Stump, Hoeffding Tree, J48, LMT, Random Forest, Random Tree, Rep Tree, Bayes Net, Naive Bayes, Maive Multi, Naive Update, MLP, SMO, Logistic Regression, kNN, kStar, LWL, JRip, OneR, PART
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Recall: 0.687 - Logistic Regression, Precision: 0.658 - Logistic Regression, FP Rate: 0.110 - Random Forest, AUC: 0.9012 - Logistc Regression}
extracted.Comments:
Authors do 2 distinct classification tasks:

1. Predict Final Grade

2. Predict Grade Status - Pass or Fail
extracted.Limitations:
The authors do not realize TP Rate and Recall are the same thing.

Goal is to predict grade using Exam and activity Scores.

extracted.Courses: 2 Editions of a Computerr Science Course
extracted.Features: [Study  Year, Gender, Birth Year, Registration, Course, Employment, Activity Point (40), Examination Point (60), Final Point (100)]
extracted.Preprocessing Details: The authors use Cronbach Alpha to check the consistency of the dataset.
extracted.Models: Decision  Stump, Hoeffding Tree, J48, LMT, Random Forest, Random Tree, Rep Tree, Bayes Net, Naive Bayes, Maive Multi, Naive Update, MLP, SMO, Logistic Regression, kNN, kStar, LWL, JRip, OneR, PART
extracted.Performance Metric: Best Model: {Recall: 0.888 - Logistic Regression, Precision: 0.888 - Logistic Regression, FP Rate: 0.114 - Logistic Regression, AUC: 0.9541 - Logistc Regression}
extracted.Comments:
Authors do 2 distinct classification tasks:

1. Predict Final Grade

2. Predict Grade Status - Pass or Fail
extracted.Limitations:
The authors do not realize TP Rate and Recall are the same thing - and is called accuracy.

Goal is to predict grade using Exam and activity Scores. 

Does not Perform cross-validation.

annotations.text: Forecasting student success can help develop specific interventions that address student needs. Authors identify the 3 types of features normally used in predictive modelling: demographics, academic background and behavioral data.

Authors procceed to compare the performance of multipe ML algorithms on the task of predicting student performance - score on final examinations. Logistic Regression achieved the best scores at predicting the exact final grade - 69% for students who passed and 89% for students who failed.
